overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a young character exploring a richly detailed Victorian-era house interior. The character moves from an ornate music room containing a harpsichord into an adjacent wood-paneled study workshop, with warm lamplight contrasting against the blue night visible through windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian music room with harpsichord and oil paintings

events.description: character turns away from harpsichord and begins walking toward doorway with red curtains

agents.ego_description: standing before the harpsichord examining the instrument, then turning to exit toward the adjacent room

entered.detail: antique wooden keyboard instrument with open lid and decorative woodwork
large framed portrait of a woman playing a lute in ornate gold frame
brass standing lamp with fringed fabric shade illuminating the room
green and gold ornate floral wallpaper covering the walls
circular patterned rug on the wooden floor beneath the harpsichord

segments.scene_description: The character stands in an ornate music room examining a harpsichord. The room features patterned wallpaper, a large oil painting of a lute player, and a brass floor lamp. After observing the instrument, the character turns and walks toward a doorway draped with red curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled study workshop with desk and bookshelves

events.description: passes through doorway with red curtains into the wood-paneled workshop study

agents.ego_description: walking through the workshop examining the work desk, bookshelves, and various equipment scattered around the room

entered.detail: large wooden work table with green banker's lamp and scattered papers
tall wooden shelves filled with books and storage boxes
large window with red curtains showing dark blue night sky outside
green banker's lamp illuminating the work surface
wooden stand holding sheet music or documents
vertical wood paneling covering the workshop walls

segments.scene_description: Passing through the red curtains into a wood-paneled workshop, the character explores a study area containing a large work desk with a green banker's lamp, tall bookshelves, and a window showing the dark night sky. The room features wooden wall paneling and various equipment including music stands and writing materials.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an ornate, artistic music room into a cozy, wood-paneled study workshop. It begins with the character examining a harpsichord amidst patterned wallpaper, a brass floor lamp, and a large oil painting of a lute player. As the character turns away from the instrument, the camera follows them toward a doorway draped with heavy red curtains. Passing through these curtains, the scene shifts into a study filled with wooden wall paneling, tall bookshelves, and music stands. The movement finally settles around a large work desk illuminated by a green banker's lamp, contrasting the warm interior light against the dark night sky visible through a nearby window.
